repo.description: Simple examples that help you get started with Appwrite + Flutter (=❤️)

terms.context_snippet: Appwrite playground is a simple way to explore the Appwrite API & Appwrite Flutter SDK. Use the source code of this page to learn how to use the different Appwrite Flutter SDK features.
